nasb.text: If he is able to fight with me and kill me, then we will become your servants; but if I prevail against him and kill him, then you shall become our servants and serve us.”

esv.text: If he is able to fight with me and kill me, then we will be your servants. But if I prevail against him and kill him, then you shall be our servants and serve us.”

cnv.text: 如果他能與我決鬥，擊殺了我，我們就作你們的奴僕；但是，如果我能勝過他，擊殺了他，你們就作我們的奴僕，服事我們。”

ccb.text: 如果他打得过我，将我杀了，我们就做你们的奴隶。但如果我战胜他，把他杀了，你们就要做我们的奴隶，服侍我们。
